mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.permission_code AS permissionCode, p.permission_name AS permissionName, p.module, p.description, p.status, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.status = 'ENABLED'

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'ENABLED'

SELECT id, permission_code AS permissionCode, permission_name AS permissionName, module, description, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM sys_permission WHERE permission_code = #{permissionCode}
